zh.Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾利德林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Susannah Thorne於1560年3月5日在英國諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯受洗時，她的父親Sir Thomas Thorne38歲，母親Mary Purefoy27歲。她於1575年6月8日與Roger Dudley在英國貝德福爾利德林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年10月29日之後。

zh-hans.Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Engl: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯
zh-hans.Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾利德林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susannah Thorne于1560年3月5日在英国諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯受洗时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Thorne38岁，母亲Mary Purefoy27岁。她于1575年6月8日与Roger Dudley在英国貝德福爾利德林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年10月29日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Susannah Thorne was christened on 5 March 1560, in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Thorne, was 38 and her mother, Mary Purefoy, was 27. She married Roger Dudley on 8 June 1575, in Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 29 October 1588.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susannah Thorne a été baptisée le 5 mars 1560, à Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Thorne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Purefoy, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Dudley le 8 juin 1575, à Lidlington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 29 octobre 1588.

Juni 1575 in Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England Roger Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 29. Oktober 1588.

Lei sposato Roger Dudley il 8 giugno 1575, nel Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 29 ottobre 1588.

ja.lifeSummary: Susannah Thorneが1560年3月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヤードリー ハスティングズで洗礼を受けた時，父Sir Thomas Thorneは38歳，母Mary Purefoyは27歳であった。1575年6月8日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアリドリントンでRoger Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年10月29日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susannah Thorne(이)가 1560년 3월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르 야어들리 하스틴그스에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Thorne(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Purefoy(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1575년 6월 8일 영국 베드퍼드실르 리들링턴에서 Roger Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 10월 29일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Thorne foi batizada em 5 de março de 1560, em Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Thorne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Purefoy, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Dudley em 8 de junho de 1575, em Lidlington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 29 de outubro de 1588.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susannah Thorne была крещена 5 марта 1560 г. в местности ярдли хастингс, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Thorne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Purefoy, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Dudley 8 июня 1575 г. в местности лидлингтон, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 29 октябрь 1588 г.
